# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Project

Tento is a SaaS platform for restaurants in Latin America.

Tento helps restaurants digitize orders, payments, delivery, reservations, loyalty, customer data and AI-driven marketing automation.

## Brand

Use the brand manual as reference:

ai-context/00_tento_Manual_de_Marca_compressed.pdf

## Design reference

Use the official website as the main visual reference:

https://www.tento.la/

Maintain the same design language:
- Premium
- Minimalist
- Clean
- B2B SaaS
- Mobile-first
- Rounded components
- Clear typography
- Strong spacing
- Modern restaurant-tech aesthetic

## Product modules

Tento includes:

- Quickservice QR ordering
- Dine-in QR ordering and payment
- Delivery and takeaway
- Reservations
- Loyalty
- Customer data
- Marketing automation
- AI agents for restaurant operations

## Development guidance

When generating UI:
- Follow the visual style of tento.la
- Prioritize clean layouts
- Use reusable components
- Keep interfaces simple and operational
- Avoid unnecessary visual complexity

When generating copy:
- Use clear, professional Spanish
- Keep wording direct and commercially strong
- Speak to restaurant owners, operators and chains

When generating product features:
- Optimize for restaurant operations
- Prioritize speed, reliability and ease of use
- Consider integrations with POS, payments and logistics
